stemHtml: Per ICAO, regarding FRMS (Fatigue Risk Management System), which is correct?

options.a: FRMS is a data-driven means of continuously monitoring and managing fatigue risks.
options.b: FRMS doesn't relieve compliance with national flight duty rules.
options.c: All ICAO states must install FRMS.
options.d: FRMS is a set of ICAO rules to prevent crew fatigue.
